data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Resolves the default/advanced SARIF-upload collision. Config change + workflow deletion both applied; operational 'green on main' AC not statically verifiable. Closing uncertified by design.".
